<!-- How does this feature work in the original NEU mod? -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature? -->
- [ ] Critical (core NEU functionality)
- [ ] High (frequently used feature)
- [ ] Medium (useful but not essential)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
